creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 190068
Rename www/tomcat-devel to www/tomcat9 and update to 9.0.4

Tomcat 9 is stable now:
> The Apache Tomcat Project is proud to announce the release of version 9.0.4 of Apache Tomcat. This is the first stable release of the 9.0.x series.
© http://tomcat.apache.org

Tested on 11.1 amd64.
